channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: You can make a multicolor MacBook Neo out of Apple’s spare parts
item.description: If you're having trouble deciding on a color for a new MacBook Neo, you might not have to choose just one. The folks over at MacWorld found that Apple doesn't appear to limit the colors of spare parts you can buy for your Neo, potentially allowing you to deck out your indigo laptop with citrus-green […]

item.title: Booking.com confirms hackers accessed customers’ data
item.description: The travel giant notified customers that their personal data, including names, emails, physical addresses, phone numbers may have been accessed in a security incident.

item.title: How to de-Gemini your Google apps
item.description: Over the past couple of years, Google has found ways to stuff Gemini in nearly every app and service it offers. Whether it's Gmail with its AI inbox or Chrome with its chat sidebar, Gemini is now inescapable inside of Workspace. I don't know about you, but I don't need an AI to tell me how to write a =SUM equation in Sheets or an outline for a first draft. Most of the time, I find Gemini is a distraction. If you feel the same way, this how-to is for you. How to remove Gemini from your personal Workspace account From the "General" tab of Gmail's settings menu, look for the Smart features che...

item.title: J’ai testé la Bang & Olufsen Beosound Premiere : la barre de son la plus belle du marché est aussi l’une des meilleures
item.description: Cent ans d'héritage. Dix haut-parleurs. La Beosound Premiere est la barre de son la plus ambitieuse que Bang & Olufsen ait jamais produite, et probablement l'une des plus audiophiles du marché, toutes marques confondues. Voyons ce qu'elle vaut vraiment.

item.title: Mode Auto et contrôle de traction : ce moteur pour vélo électrique muscle son jeu face aux Bosch et DJI
item.description: Avec le contrôle de traction et un mode auto « Smart Assist » personnalisable, le moteur Mahle M40 se spécialise davantage pour séduire les possesseurs de VTT électriques.

item.title: 'The decision is deeply troubling': Tesla gets a green light for Full Self-Driving in Europe — but not everyone is happy about it
item.description: Tesla’s Full Self-Driving system has just been approved in Europe for the first time, but critics have called the decision "deeply troubling" —here's why.

item.title: Comment Keychron ouvre désormais ses claviers mécaniques à toutes sortes de modifications
item.description: Le constructeur hongkongais Keychron a mis en ligne des fichiers source entièrement modifiables pour certaines des pièces les plus importantes de ses claviers mécaniques. Une belle initiative qui vient compléter un volet logiciel déjà open source.

item.title: An ex-programmer’s devastating take on AI data centers is going viral — and it’s hard to ignore
item.description: A viral speech from an ex-programmer opposing a new Ohio data center highlights the growing backlash against the real-world environmental and economic costs of powering AI

item.title: Top iRestore Deals for Hair Growth and LED Therapy Devices
item.description: Today, iRestore is offering up to $900 off select devices and up to $1,550 off bundles.

item.title: Majority of Australian kids are still on banned social media platforms, study finds
item.description: Many countries are pursuing social media bans for anyone under 16, but a recent poll is putting the effectiveness of such laws into question. The Molly Rose Foundation, a charity organization that focuses on preventing online harm, recently published a study that polled 1,050 Australian children between ages 12 and 15 in March. The study's results showed that 61 percent of those between 12 and 15 who previously had access to affected social media platforms still have one or more active accounts. Australia made a first-in-the-world decision to ban social media for those under 16 years old, begi...

item.title: Voici les images d’Artemis II qui racontent le mieux la puissance et l’émotion de cette mission
item.description: Lors de leur voyage de la Terre à la Lune, les astronautes d’Artemis II ont capturé des images spectaculaires qui racontent une aventure humaine et spatiale exceptionnelle.

item.title: Les 10 smartphones les plus populaires de la semaine sur Frandroid : Samsung place son trio en tête
item.description: Pour notre top 10 des smartphones les plus populaires de la semaine sur Frandroid, c'est un constructeur inattendu qui prend la tête de notre classement. Dans le reste, tous les constructeurs Android ou presque réussissent à placer un modèle.

item.title: The Revamp Tri-Care is heavy and awkward, but I can't fault how well it dries and protects my hair
item.description: If you're willing to live with the handling quirks, this dryer's results speak for themselves.

item.title: I spent a week with the budget-friendly Creative Pebble Pro and was impressed by its solid sound and petite form factor
item.description: The Creative Pebble Pro is very, very affordable and it sounds pretty good for the price. Of course, it comes with plenty of compromises due to its low price.

item.title: Comment tester la prochaine versions de Windows ? Microsoft fait enfin le ménage
item.description: Microsoft a annoncé une refonte de son programme Windows Insider. À la clé : une simplification pour faciliter la vie des utilisateurs.

item.title: Read OpenAI’s latest internal memo about beating the competition — including Anthropic
item.description: OpenAI's chief revenue officer, Denise Dresser, sent a four-page memo to employees on Sunday about the company's strategic direction, emphasizing the need to lock in users and grow its enterprise business. The memo, which was viewed by The Verge, repeatedly underlines the importance of building a moat around its AI products, to combat how easy […]

item.title: Test Cloud Alpha 2 Wireless : le plus complet des casques HyperX
item.description: Évolution résolument haut de gamme du Cloud Alpha Wireless, le HyperX Cloud Alpha 2 Wireless mise sur une station de contrôle dédiée, une connectivité enrichie et une autonomie annoncée jusqu’à 250 heures.

item.title: J’ai testé la recherche Gemini sur Google Photos : résultats, avis à chaud et désactivation
item.description: En France, la recherche avec Gemini s'invite progressivement sur l'application Google Photos. On l'a testée et voici tout ce qu'il faut savoir sur cette fonction.

item.title: Meilleurs smartphones Honor : lequel choisir en 2026 ?
item.description: La marque chinoise Honor prend une place toujours plus importante sur le marché de la téléphonie en 2026. Parmi toute la gamme, quel smartphone Honor choisir ? Suivez le guide !

item.title: Fitbit's new screenless Whoop-style tracker is a better fit for the brand than a smartwatch — it's a return to the 'almost invisible' pedometer of 2008
item.description: What's old is new again — a screenless Fitbit focused on analysis is a return to what made the brand great.

item.title: Malgré la hausse des prix de la mémoire et du stockage, ce laptop OLED avec 24 Go de RAM et SSD de 1 To ne dépasse pas 800 €
item.description: Alors que les prix des composants continuent de flamber, il est encore possible de dénicher des PC portables bien équipés à un prix accessible. Par exemple, le Lenovo IdeaPad Slim 3, avec écran OLED, 24 Go de RAM et un SSD de 1 To est en ce moment proposé à 799,99 euros au lieu de 899,99 euros par Darty et la Fnac.

item.title: OpenAI flags third-party data issue — all macOS users should update now
item.description: OpenAI rotated certificates and updated its apps out of an abundance of caution.

item.title: 'The LG C5 is a superb all-purpose TV that offers excellent performance and value' — and now the 77-inch model has an astonishing $1,700 discount
item.description: 'The LG C5 is a superb all-purpose TV that offers excellent performance and value,' and Best Buy has just dropped the 77-inch model to its lowest price yet.

item.title: Meta Is Warned That Facial Recognition Glasses Will Arm Sexual Predators
item.description: More than 70 organizations, including the ACLU, EPIC, and Fight for the Future, say the AI smart glasses feature would endanger abuse victims, immigrants, and LGBTQ+ people.

item.title: 10 Cursed Islands to Visit Ahead of ‘Widow’s Bay’
item.description: The Apple TV series starring Matthew Rhys arrives April 29, so get ready with these movies that also explore coastal terrors.

item.title: Man Utd vs Leeds Live Streams: How to watch Premier League 2025/26 from anywhere in the world
item.description: All the ways to watch Man Utd vs Leeds live streams online and from anywhere, as the Red Devils resume their hunt for a top-four finish in the Premier League.

item.title: Microsoft says Copilot is for ‘entertainment' not work, Meta’s Muse Spark and 7 other AI stories you need to catch up on
item.description: Want the latest AI news? Catch up on OpenAI’s $122 billion haul, Microsoft Copilot warnings, Meta’s Muse Spark and more.

item.title: What is the release date for Invincible season 4 episode 7 on Prime Video?
item.description: Only two more episodes remain of Invincible season 4 — here's when the first of those will be released.

item.title: Streaming sportif illégal : la justice française déclenche une offensive sans précédent contre les DNS, VPN et FAI
item.description: La lutte contre le piratage sportif franchit un cap historique en France avec une offensive judiciaire d'une ampleur inédite. En s'attaquant simultanément aux fournisseurs d'accès à internet, aux résolveurs DNS et aux réseaux privés virtuels, le tribunal judiciaire de Paris a décidé de verrouiller toutes les portes d'entrée de l'IPTV pirate.

item.title: Slate raises $650 million to make its budget electric truck
item.description: Slate Auto, the EV startup backed by Jeff Bezos, raised $650 million to fund its effort to build an affordable electric pickup truck expected to start in the mid-$20,000s. The company plans on delivering its first EV later this year. The Series C round was led by TWG Global, headed by Guggenheim Partners founder and […]

item.title: NASA Sets the Record Straight on That ‘Missing Chunk’ of Artemis 2’s Heat Shield
item.description: Social media users were quick to point out what looks like a large piece of missing material from the bottom of the spacecraft.

item.title: It's time to upgrade — I've found 22 deals at Best Buy that save you up to $1,000 on TVs, laptops, and more
item.description: Best Buy has launched its Ultimate Upgrade sale, featuring discounts of up to 50% on TVs, laptops, headphones, and more — and bigger savings when you trade-in.

item.title: « C’est le grand débat de l’être humain versus le robot » : plongée fascinante dans les coulisses de la seule usine Tesla d’Europe (vidéo)
item.description: Nous avons visité l'usine automobile Giga Berlin de Tesla pour décrypter les coulisses de production de la Tesla Model Y. Dans notre vidéo, vous découvrirez toutes les étapes de conception de ce modèle et les enjeux majeurs de cette industrie européenne, ainsi qu'une comparaison avec la Chine, dont Xiaomi et Zeekr.

item.title: Microsoft is testing OpenClaw-like AI bots for 365 Copilot
item.description: Microsoft is looking into ways it can integrate OpenClaw-style features into 365 Copilot, according to a report from The Information. The test reportedly comes as part of efforts to make its 365 Copilot AI assistant "run autonomously around the clock" while completing tasks on behalf of users. Omar Shahine, Microsoft's corporate vice president, confirmed to […]...

item.title: Google’s Pixel 10A is a good midrange phone that’s $50 off
item.description: If it’s time for you to upgrade your phone, it’s worth considering the Pixel 10A, Google’s latest midrange phone that has some (but not all) of the new software features of the pricier $599 Pixel 10. Every color of the 128GB 10A — including the alluring “berry” tone — is down to $449 ($50 off) […]

item.title: « C’est une question de quelques semaines » : Le rachat de SFR serait dans sa phase finale
item.description: Le consortium Orange-Bouygues-Iliad s'apprête à déposer une deuxième offre de rachat pour acquérir SFR, ce n'est plus qu'une question de temps. Mais alors que SFR tente de faire grimper les enchères, le dossier risque de se faire rattraper par l'agenda politique.

item.title: The Hunger Games: Sunrise on the Reaping trailer reminds me even more of the most deranged horror movie of the 20th century
item.description: The new trailer for The Hunger Games: Sunrise on the Reaping is a masterclass in fan lip service — but it's reminding me of something else entirely.

item.title: What Is the Best Fitness Tracker in 2026? Garmin, Oura, More
item.description: With almost ten years of hands-on testing, WIRED knows what separates the best fitness trackers from the rest.

item.title: ‘The Meta Brand Is Not Something People Want to Put Anywhere Near Their Face,’ Says Snapchat CEO
item.description: Snapchat CEO Evan Spiegel thinks that Meta is fumbling the bag on smart glasses.

item.title: Linux rules on using AI-generated code - Copilot is OK, but humans must take 'full responsibility for the contribution'
item.description: Linux developers are permitted to use AI assistance, but individual contributors are still wholly accountable for their work.

item.title: The Lenovo Legion Go 2 handheld costs more than two Nvidia RTX 5080 GPUs — and that's genuinely absurd
item.description: Prices for PC hardware continue to skyrocket, and now Lenovo's Legion Go 2 handheld is placed higher up on the list of overpriced devices.

item.title: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch signals IPO readiness as AI agents fuel revenue surge
item.description: "The company is ready and getting more ready for every day," Rauch said about an IPO at HumanX conference.

item.title: DNA From 1,500-Year-Old Korean Mass Grave Exposes a Brutal Ancient Ritual
item.description: In ancient times, power plays were on a whole other level.

item.title: Les astronomes voient émerger un étrange motif dans les collisions de trous noirs, et cela intrigue
item.description: Leur existence ne fait plus de doute. Pourtant, les trous noirs continuent de défier les astronomes. Grâce aux ondes gravitationnelles, ces derniers découvrent aujourd’hui que leurs collisions ne se ressemblent pas toutes. Et pourraient trahir des origines différentes.

item.title: Intel May Have an Answer to AMD’s Most Powerful Gaming CPUs
item.description: The Intel and AMD CPU rivalry is getting exciting again.

item.title: « Invitation à tester un nouveau produit » Amazon : attention à cette arnaque qui refait surface
item.description: Une arnaque déjà connue des autorités refait surface en France. Certains reçoivent des lettres mystérieuses provenant soi-disant d'Amazon. Il s'agit en réalité d'une arnaque.
